title: The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1887
full_text: The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1887 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 188719 Act Number: 19 Enactment Date: 1887-09-23 Act Year: 1887 Short Title: The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1887 Long Title: An Act to provide for the Administration of the Estate of His late Majesty the King of Oudh. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The King of Oudh's Estate Act, 1887 Show all section Section 1. Administration of the estate of the late king of Oudh by the Governor General in Council. Section 2. Indemnity to Agent to the Governor General. Section 3. Effect of Act.
